next_steps: Perform bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, silver stain, fungal/AFB cultures, and PCR
Initiate empiric treatment for P. jirovecii with high-dose trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole and corticosteroids
Obtain serum cryptococcal antigen and histoplasma antigen (urine and serum)
Perform CT scan of the chest to characterize pulmonary nodules
Delay initiation of antiretroviral therapy to avoid immune reconstitution inflammatory syndrome
Provide supportive care for hemodynamic instability

differential_diagnoses: Bacterial pneumonia (e.g., S. pneumoniae, S. aureus)
next_steps: Perform urgent bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for comprehensive infectious workup (AFB, fungal, bacterial cultures, PCR for PJP and CMV, cytology)
Initiate empiric high-dose trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole and systemic corticosteroids for suspected PJP
Obtain chest CT for high-resolution characterization of pulmonary findings
Collect serum (1,3)-beta-D-glucan and antigen tests for Histoplasma and Cryptococcus
Obtain blood cultures and arterial blood gas analysis
Consult Infectious Disease and Pulmonary Critical Care teams
Continue hemodynamic resuscitation and provide respiratory support
Defer initiation of antiretroviral therapy to avoid potential immune reconstitution inflammatory syndrome (IRIS)
